DECLARATION OF ARIEL GERSHON IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFF MOTION TO COMPEL INSPECTION OF THE SUBJECT PROPERTY AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 100007605) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMYTH, BRIAN HUTCHINSON, BEN
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-09-2017 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFFS BRIAN SMYTH, BEN HUTCHINSON'S MOTION TO COMPEL INSPECTION OF THE SUBJECT PROPERTY, TO WHICH NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED, IS GRANTED. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER WITHIN THREE BUSINESS DAYS OF SERVICE OF THE COURT'S ORDER TO ARRANGE A MUTUALLY AGREEABLE TIME FOR INSPECTION OF THE PROPERTY. THE INSPECTION SHALL TAKE PLACE NO LATER THAN JANUARY 20, 2017. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANA B. KRUZE; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2017 Continued To Mar-29-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Plaintiff Motion To Compel Inspection Of The Subject Property And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Ariel M. Gershon of the law offices of Greenstein & McDonald (415.773.1240 ext. 351) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFFS BRIAN SMYTH, BEN HUTCHINSON'S Motion To Compel Inspection Of The Subject Property, to which no opposition was filed, is GRANTED. The parties are ordered to meet and confer within three business days of service of the Court's order to arrange a mutually agreeable time for inspection of the property. The inspection shall take place no later than January 20, 2017. Plaintiff's Request For Sanctions is DENIED. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Diana B. Kruze; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2016 Continued To Feb-15-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
